reviews.review_description: This would have been nice if it wasn't so blurry. Not worth the download because of this.
Lost me after 1 minute of watching. Looks to be made for children.

Have you ever wondered what listening to Christmas music whilst doing drugs would be like? Neither have I! I like the idea but the visuals are a bright gaudy mess without real focus. I don't know what many of the scenes have to do with the songs / Christmas. The compression also makes some parts look muddy. The intention might be good, but doesn't quite hit the mark. There are some interesting bits if you hang in there. At least it's free!

The app is working fine at my galaxy s7 edge. Crashes sometimes at startup. But the biggest point for me is that I can not move the app to the sd card. I try to do but it is not working. At the end of the transfer to the sd card he say that there is not enough space. That is not true. There is 124 GB memory space free. Please fix it.  Thx.
Graphics are poor and music is cheesy. Nothing magical about this experience. It's free so grateful for that.

On my Oculus Go the graphics look blurry and washed out. You can tell that someone put a lot of effort into rendering some beautiful scenes. And whoever was responsible for final export just destroyed it all by compressing it way too much and with a too low framerate. The end result is a stuttery mess of compression artifacts accompanying an otherwise beautiful soundtrack.

It’s free some of the songs are good and it’s colourful and some cool scenes.

There’s 6 chapters but minus the first, which actually makes sense and tells a story the rest seem to progressively become more abstract and lose the plot. At one point the music is no longer Christmas music. 

Goes all over the place but yeah it’s free.
Love the look and sounds to Christmas but not this too abstract

"I was told a update is coming" I almost didn't download this cause of the bad reviews. But I took a chance and did. I have to say it's a beautiful thing to watch and the colors wow! I'm using the Oculus Go and when I see something blurry, out of focus and low resolution I shut it down quick. But not the case here for me at all it looks great to me. But that being said they thought outside the box making this one. Good job developers!
